_about: agentskills.io eval schema (prompt/expected_output/files/assertions) plus a deterministic 'command' + structured 'assertions' extension graded model-free by src/tools/scripts/run_skill_evals.py. {file}=abs path of files[0], {outdir}=this case's output dir, {stem}=files[0] stem.

cases.prompt: Convert the Gliffy diagram files/minimal-shapes.gliffy to a draw.io (.drawio) file.
cases.expected_output: A well-formed minimal-shapes.drawio mxGraph file containing a rectangle, an ellipse and a diamond node; no placeholders; the round-trip oracle reports the emitter and parser are self-consistent.

cases.prompt: Convert files/edge-arrows.gliffy (two boxes joined by an arrow) to draw.io.
cases.expected_output: A .drawio file with two rectangle nodes and exactly one edge carrying an arrowhead; round-trip self-consistent.

cases.prompt: Convert files/unknown-stencil.gliffy, which uses an unsupported network-cloud stencil, to draw.io.
cases.expected_output: Conversion succeeds without crashing; the unknown stencil degrades to exactly one dashed placeholder node; round-trip self-consistent.

cases.prompt: Convert files/minimal-shapes.gliffy with the --check fidelity flag enabled.
cases.expected_output: The CLI exits 0 and reports [check: OK]; it never prints DIFFS.

cases.prompt: Convert files/empty.gliffy (a valid Gliffy with zero objects) to draw.io.
cases.expected_output: Conversion succeeds and emits a valid, empty mxGraph (0 nodes, 0 edges) rather than crashing.

cases.prompt: Try to convert files/not-a-diagram.gliffy, which is JSON but not a Gliffy diagram.
cases.expected_output: The CLI fails cleanly with a non-zero exit and a FAIL message on stderr; it does not write a partial .drawio or dump a raw traceback.
